content: I’m sorry to hear that you’re feeling this way. It’s important to communicate openly with your husband about your feelings. Consider discussing your concerns and what has been bothering you in the relationship. If things feel particularly challenging, you might also look into counseling or therapy, which can provide support and perspective. Ultimately, taking time to reflect on what you want and need is crucial. Remember, it’s okay to seek help from trusted friends, family, or professionals during this time.
